Added_Other.purpose: Improves the appearance of UI by making lines and borders look better on different screen sizes.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Links game versions to specific code changes using Git hashes.
Changed_Other.purpose: Helps developers track changes and ensure players are using the latest version.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Changes how dynamic strings with timestamps are processed.
Changed_Other.purpose: Ensures that time-related information updates more accurately in real-time for players.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way version control information is stored and accessed.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enhances performance and stability for developers, indirectly benefiting players with smoother updates.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlipTimeStampFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes the way timestamps are converted to strings.
Changed_Other.purpose: Makes displaying time-related information faster and more efficient for players.

Removed_Other.name: FFlagSelfViewFixMakeup_Staged
Removed_Other.mechanism: Fixes how makeup appears in self-view for players.
Removed_Other.purpose: Ensures players see their makeup correctly when looking at themselves.
